goal: Hub Risk radar honest count via HubIntent.AntiPatterns + record 8/8 eval baseline

summary.title: Hub Risk radar honest count via HubIntent.AntiPatterns + record 8/8 eval baseline
summary.what: HubIntent gains AntiPatterns []domain.AntiPattern; hubIntentFromView copies them through; team_health.hasAnyAntiPattern returns len>0. eval-results.md updated to record the second baseline (8/8 pass after parallel fix ee7ff18 closed F1+F2). Test pins the anti-pattern-only fixture path.
summary.why: Pre-this-fix Hub Risk radar used len(Risks)>0 as the risk-bearing proxy. An intent that recorded a hard constraint without a soft warning was invisible — the load-bearing safety surface was undercounted. Live count 94→95 confirms the gap.

decisions.chose: small scoped PR — radar honest count + eval-results.md update
decisions.rationale: closes the eval-driven loop visibly without bundling unrelated work

anti_patterns.what: Using a soft-signal field as a hard-signal proxy when the hard-signal field is available
anti_patterns.why: silently undercounts; the user notices only when a real omission lands in prod. Prefer the hard-signal field directly.

followups: Wire an LLM runner wrapper and run code-first vs intent-first for the first time — that is the next layer of the validation experiment, all preconditions are now green
